meaning: 1. rendering (computing); 2. to add washes of ink or color to a drawin
sentence: 这张图渲染完需要两个小时。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng tú xuànrǎn wán xūyào liǎng gè xiǎoshí.
english: Rendering this image takes two hours.

sentence: 他大学时选修了程序设计课。
pinyin: Tā dàxué shí xuǎnxiū le chéngxù shèjì kè.
english: He took a computer programming course in university.

meaning: 1. a building used as a factory; 2. factory (building); 3. CL:座[zuò],棟
sentence: 旧厂房已经改建成了创意园区。
pinyin: Jiù chǎngfáng yǐjīng gǎijiàn chéng le chuàngyì yuánqū.
english: The old factory building has been converted into a creative park.

sentence: 在很多国家卖淫是违法的。
pinyin: Zài hěn duō guójiā màiyín shì wéifǎ de.
english: Prostitution is illegal in many countries.

sentence: 政府出台新政策支持中小企业发展。
pinyin: Zhèng fǔ chū tái xīn zhèng cè zhī chí zhōng xiǎo qǐ yè fā zhǎn.
english: The government introduced new policies to support the development of small and medium enterprises.
